creator: tobik@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to lbartoletti from comment #0)
distinfo seems to be wrong:

=> QuiteRSS-0.18.6-src.tar.gz doesn't seem to exist in /home/tobias/distfiles/.
=> Attempting to fetch http://quiterss.org/files/0.18.6/QuiteRSS-0.18.6-src.tar.gz
fetch: http://quiterss.org/files/0.18.6/QuiteRSS-0.18.6-src.tar.gz: size mismatch: expected 3481730, actual 3481123
